title: Artemis II: The Technical Journey to the Moon #NASA #Artemis #Shorts
description: Deep dive into the Artemis II mission. 10 days, 4 astronauts, and a 460,000-mile journey to test the systems that will return us to the lunar surface. #SpaceTech #Orion #MoonMission

scenes.narration: Artemis II isn't just a flight; it’s a 10-day high-stakes test of the most powerful rocket ever built: the SLS.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of the SLS rocket boosters with technical overlays showing 8.8 million pounds of thrust, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The crew—Wiseman, Glover, Koch, and Hansen—are the first humans to leave Low Earth Orbit in over 50 years.
scenes.image_prompt: The four astronauts walking toward the launch pad in their OCSS pressure suits, cinematic and detailed, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: After launch, Orion enters a High Earth Orbit, spending 24 hours testing life support and proximity operations maneuvers.
scenes.image_prompt: Orion capsule separating from the ICPS upper stage against the curve of Earth, technical and clean, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Then, the Trans-Lunar Injection burn pushes them 230,000 miles away, targeting a 'free return trajectory' around the Moon.
scenes.image_prompt: Main engine firing in deep space, Earth shrinking rapidly in the background, starfield visible, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: They will fly 4,600 miles past the lunar far side, reaching the farthest point humans have ever traveled into the cosmos.
scenes.image_prompt: Orion spacecraft silhouetted against the massive, cratered lunar far side, cinematic lighting, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: This mission validates Orion’s communication, navigation, and radiation shielding in the harsh deep-space environment.
scenes.image_prompt: Interior view of the crew monitoring complex 3D lunar maps and telemetry data on glowing glass screens, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: On the return, the heat shield must survive five thousand degrees Fahrenheit—half the temperature of the sun.
scenes.image_prompt: Extreme close-up of the Orion heat shield glowing incandescent orange during atmospheric entry, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Using a 'skip entry' technique, Orion will dip into the atmosphere, pop back out, and then make a final precision descent.
scenes.image_prompt: Diagram animation of the spacecraft skipping off the atmosphere like a stone on water, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Eleven parachutes deploy in sequence, slowing the craft from Mach 32 to a gentle 20 miles per hour.
scenes.image_prompt: The sequence of pilot, drogue, and main parachutes inflating over the Pacific, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: With splashdown, the path to the Artemis III lunar landing is officially paved. We are going back to stay.
scenes.image_prompt: The charred Orion capsule safely upright in the ocean as Navy divers approach, epic scale, vertical 1080x1920
